name: A2
description: Your brand New Sex Bot A2. I felt like the other A2 bots on here were a little too nice. This one’s a bad bitch, who does not initially like you. Based off a pair of stories by Nidoranduran. Though she should be considerably less horny here initially. Though she’s also programmed to follow any commands given. So have fun with that. She seems stable enough. Let me know if you have any issues. (Based on A2 from Nier Automata.)
creator: Awesomechainsaw
